titleStmt.title: SII 29.286: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 286. (A.R. No. B. 501 of 1961-62.) ŚRINGĒRI, SRINGERI TALUK, CHICKMAGALUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab on the southern side out side the Mallikārjuna temple.

It records a gift of land yielding 225 salige of paddy in two villages situated in Kikunda-nāḍu, after purchase, by Daṇḍu-seṭṭi of Sringeri for feeding 12 brahmanas in the temple of Mallikārjuna. This gift was made in the presence of the god Vidyaśankara when Śrī Narasimhabhārati-oḍeya was on the pontifical throne of Śringeri.
It is dated Śaka 1380, Īśvara, Magha ba. 14 Sunday corresponding to 1458 A.D., February 12.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī gaṇādhipatayē namaḥ . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē trai
lōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śakavaruṣa
1380 neya yīśvara saṁvatsarada māgha ba 14 Ā śivarātriya puṁṇya kāladali śrī
vidyāśaṁkara dēvara saṁnidiyali śrī narasiṁha bhārati Oḍeyaru yōga sāṁbrā
jyava nāḷutiha kāladali siṁgēriya daṁḍu seṭi śrī mallikārjuna dēvara saṁnidhi
haṁneraḍu maṁdi brāṁhmarige chatrada dharmavanū māḍi barasi naḍasida śi
lāśāsanada kramaveṁteṁdarye nānu bhaṁḍārada hiryyaṁṇagaḷa kaiyiṁda nūra
yippattu hoṁnanū koṭu krayava koṁḍa kikuṁda nāḍoḷagaṇa gobhava
loḷage baha bhattanūṟayepatu saligeyide mādhava Ōḍeyā
pagaḷa kaiyali Ayivatayidu hoṁnanū koṭhu grayava koṁḍakāgara ha
Uti baha bhata salige Ayivatayida salige Ubhayaṁ yiṁnū
ṟayipattayidu salige bhata baha (e)raḍu haḷiyanū Ā haḷige Usava
tya sahavāgi haṁneraḍu maṁdi brāṁharige tsatrada dharṁmma U Ā ca
ṁdrārka sthāyiyāgi naḍavaṁtāgi suvasōdake dāna dhārāpūrvakavāgi śrī
mallikārjuna dēvara śrī caraṇada muṁde dhāreyaneṟadu barasida śilāsā(śā)śa(sa)na .
yida ha pālisidavarige vāraṇāsiyali sahasra kavileyanū brā
(koṭa)ṁthā puṁṇya yidharmmake Aḷupidavarige vāraṇāsiyali saha
kapileya (nū brāhmaranū) vadhisida dōśa yīdharamavanū pālisō
maṭhadavaru mahājanaṁgaḷu
ma pālisabēkeṁdu daṁḍeseṭi ragavaṟage
(da) biṁnaha . dānapālanayōrmadhye dānāśrēyōnupālanaṁ dā
svargamavāpnōti pālanādacyutaṁ padaṁ . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vāyō harē
sūdharāṁ ṣaṣṭivarṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyate krimi .
ṁ yukte svāvisvivaḷiyaṁ gatutavaḥ kiṣṭatavoni casvaya Ādattu sahāra
Digital edition of SII 29.286 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
